Derek,
I’m writing you this email from my phone, so let me be brief: **We’re running out of time to reach our 5,000 individual contribution goal before midnight tonight.** Reaching this goal would send a powerful message that Virginia Democrats are united and ready to stand up to extremists like Amanda Chase in the Virginia Republican Party. The situation is urgent because Amanda Chase has held substantial leads in three consecutive polls. Will you use this secure link to make the last-minute donation we need to reach our goal? (Reminder: Any donation made before midnight will be doubled thanks to a generous group of donors). **Chip in using this secure link:**[**https://secure.trm/Feb2021/x4l1**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOdHIjRanHBj7PEkalb5pfA89HI9vaYMuXh6oOrf38Yn_238Nt-pN0OBl9GNOb6QJsrvyl7xnVOEi5MDfL_SxASchCGiWzgBZHv6j4x1vvWOczQNIMpdakYi1t9VE3oRF9Kb3_a8tMOtkn0zd6UuBB4LkzOFmgX2FJSwUNmW1qeJyc-mIMGkC5k1vV7WQYCI3j_BKpgMeAMRc6fLhH9kb1xy5r_7XRIWDelnaZUWsY6y45s4IrLTaUXxuewICAs2e7wWIbQV91WrCOyP7sTM3j6nJ07rqwlqC74xgTHANSWIZrfHIEUjA2RJ0CqAshogYEzN-qL_NuGHJdzmWVg0etOEZfNpfgf_rhENOf21TQ2_IOk2SKBAuDjeb6DXTcffy-E8WtkhTVuAwXrZwFWcmaEA/39u/-fmggbaoS22Y6ZySVXfq7Q/h1/_WAXlc3Q0bll2q03KO_TGWaXGgEY5B1YGfSGnEbLJiU) I’m running for Governor because there are big challenges facing Virginia and it's going to take bold leadership to move us forward. We can’t allow Trumpism to take hold in our Commonwealth. We have to fight back if we’re going to stop it. I’m ready, but I need you with me. Thank you, Terry Sent from my iPhone

name: Ralph Northam
subject: I need your help to protect our Democratic Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NncDmTzEiE6TYjdYSDvfjK8ikz26zpR7z866aCE6-2A=/nZtwDAQidPvcovkG5FIQTGEKR3KD4UgN2FYcLCpF9DU=)
---
Friend, Now that the legislative session is behind us, we are full steam ahead to November when all 100 seats in the House of Delegates are on the ballot. Thanks to your efforts in 2017 and 2019, Democrats hold the majority by the slimmest of margins. _**We _must_ protect our Majority and secure our Democratic future in Virginia.**_ **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/NncDmTzEiE6TYjdYSDvfjK8ikz26zpR7z866aCE6-2A=/7Ez-hOis9qvG64qkGVW-zuL8Kt_ROMKTa1Q2NZc__BY=)****[Please contribute to The Way Ahead 's Virginia Future Fund today so we can kickstart our effort to protect our Blue Majority!](https://act.myngp.com/el/NncDmTzEiE6TYjdYSDvfjK8ikz26zpR7z866aCE6-2A=/7Ez-hOis9qvG64qkGVW-zuL8Kt_ROMKTa1Q2NZc__BY=)** Under Democratic leadership in Virginia, we have passed historic gun safety legislation, repealed medically-unnecessary restrictions on women's healthcare, repealed racially discriminatory language in the Virginia Code, made Election Day a state holiday, and made Virginia the first Southern state to provide sweeping anti-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people. We are proud to be the third state in the nation to pass a ban on "no knock" warrants, and we have made monumental progress on criminal justice reform by becoming the first state in the South to abolish the death penalty. [**All of the progress we 've made is at stake if we don't protect our Blue Majority in November - I hope you can chip in to support our efforts today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NncDmTzEiE6TYjdYSDvfjK8ikz26zpR7z866aCE6-2A=/7Ez-hOis9qvG64qkGVW-zuL8Kt_ROMKTa1Q2NZc__BY=) Thanks for all you do. \- Ralph Northam

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/NncDmTzEiE6TYjdYSDvfjK8ikz26zpR7z866aCE6-2A=/BX-UchHMyOB76Bg3pfIhECCKaTt7ogZ2bSHzZXo-zQo=) |

name: Team Cheney
subject: We have never seen such reckless decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming
body:
Our country is facing some of the greatest security threats ever

Friend,
**Our country is facing some of the greatest security threats ever, and the Biden administration continues to compromise our security.**__

Despite the fact that China and Russia continue to increase their modernization and defense spending, Democrats are threatening to cut our defense spending.

If we continue down this path, our enemies will grow stronger while we fall behind. We can't let that happen. We need your help to take back the House in 2022 and get our country back on track.
[HELP TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P9cXOyDPJOatjkXRg0LYk9h_5OMu5r7j6iCSv_MC-dmuN0uB4eOmsjfAllB4vpqvi9BDxr32g6GnikOW4KbKxf21d3Whe--HBd9O0WQyV1md8jdntGXocPRMKuVFN7yfOze6elGEFc7TF5KXODQWvn7sRxnXJOtDwIBsJEeCZPqYvSo6xRpLmIoAzeyb9N0HNY9ZJvyQr-uth2SbKNUojas-QPm4J7V1bbs_4ynTTRDN-a_r6_1DVjssTyC-aSlF03iQOpDi41bKLW9UVVS3N7MM1_TdtiNUU85lYtot_mrVOlVRBY85nOSc0E4MFXTlxFPgdsG8tQduHoqb6NTxouygs2Zc6On5EoilRYU1UCjxP9BMbu_Y0tc77AsVanXvacYdlU_PL235LnM7C6PqM5q7mTweZnmBwkn1cYNojDD0ncdrfeRQkoK7s4Y8qfZbjzciW50Qh7M=&c=-AXJq1KJ8dDBWK8kEzkuBrBYash9zRfjH4G24o7WYL9j3UZJHM2M0Q==&ch=8YD41UfbgWCIOYki-1Djrn-kybzY4GDp56LQuYn5J0kbE4PuwBt_kA==)

President Biden and Speaker Pelosi continue to turn a blind eye to the threat China and Russia pose to our country. **Instead of standing up to our foreign adversaries this Administration is more focused on appeasing them.**

**Our country cannot be weak.** As the beacon of democracy and freedom we cannot afford to back down to our adversaries.

We need leaders who are not afraid to stand up to our adversaries. Help us take back the House in 2022 and secure our country's global status.

[HELP TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P9cXOyDPJOatjkXRg0LYk9h_5OMu5r7j6iCSv_MC-dmuN0uB4eOmsjfAllB4vpqvi9BDxr32g6GnikOW4KbKxf21d3Whe--HBd9O0WQyV1md8jdntGXocPRMKuVFN7yfOze6elGEFc7TF5KXODQWvn7sRxnXJOtDwIBsJEeCZPqYvSo6xRpLmIoAzeyb9N0HNY9ZJvyQr-uth2SbKNUojas-QPm4J7V1bbs_4ynTTRDN-a_r6_1DVjssTyC-aSlF03iQOpDi41bKLW9UVVS3N7MM1_TdtiNUU85lYtot_mrVOlVRBY85nOSc0E4MFXTlxFPgdsG8tQduHoqb6NTxouygs2Zc6On5EoilRYU1UCjxP9BMbu_Y0tc77AsVanXvacYdlU_PL235LnM7C6PqM5q7mTweZnmBwkn1cYNojDD0ncdrfeRQkoK7s4Y8qfZbjzciW50Qh7M=&c=-AXJq1KJ8dDBWK8kEzkuBrBYash9zRfjH4G24o7WYL9j3UZJHM2M0Q==&ch=8YD41UfbgWCIOYki-1Djrn-kybzY4GDp56LQuYn5J0kbE4PuwBt_kA==)
Thank you for your help,

Team Cheney

name: Young Kim
subject: Bad news and good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress

We said what we meant, and meant what we said. The far-left is crazy... one hundred percent! &zwnj
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHi9UE2HlD2Njx6uZmOskUcNZa5Fw3BBq8G3VkioOfmxpCoRrrMLJpPUxE1q6mx79AVMdWEy4Ofr92Dwaxwh-UcyLvgzpn2IBjH6AE-tl4TrrM9UL4zUkli1K-UQ_YeTY0RIz_5rJhAk0CCc5V0LLxKKQ2kjXJBsrLO-5C0Oe4IizTRJdVIRk7bos_M1McHCPo4AECPphyL9FnNusJ2SvYkbWTmMY_nPjN4Ls66uuXtWmbFcrg1-xLkJCIapsxRhP5etZGLHyUrJ-jVZYOhDGRop_dJP93zTO8du8D2uSRWMn6zgRRISMwdARHGkeMQXuAqDVjDWuCz24d7nd4sSnaCDD9BS3oa5GZGnyEe9xFdzLH2QR62qd2RG-rKHjzjcBItQyl2R6qxbtwNaRHrhWxaSMPMKof2XzD9MxKuB7SZ9TD6vZLEyHC9eCb8QXbGHVKDsL_Uor79XMNMkTOI_3PHPEocn6LgS&c=3RX1I7fnkMXjX0tJjJrKs2Yn3nTAEEY6si9S28GOdLkr5dIHggC8-g==&ch=yJ8SHgcI9NIMzF-5evqLVdNuRv8mF0FZFWQObdgc1Yn9yJbsD08gBw==) [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHi9UE2HlD2Njx6uZmOskUcNZa5Fw3BBq8G3VkioOfmxpCoRrrMLJpPUxE1q6mx79AVMdWEy4Ofr92Dwaxwh-UcyLvgzpn2IBjH6AE-tl4TrrM9UL4zUkli1K-UQ_YeTY0RIz_5rJhAk0CCc5V0LLxKKQ2kjXJBsrLO-5C0Oe4IizTRJdVIRk7bos_M1McHCPo4AECPphyL9FnNusJ2SvYkbWTmMY_nPjN4Ls66uuXtWmbFcrg1-xLkJCIapsxRhP5etZGLHyUrJ-jVZYOhDGRop_dJP93zTO8du8D2uSRWMn6zgRRISMwdARHGkeMQXuAqDVjDWuCz24d7nd4sSnaCDD9BS3oa5GZGnyEe9xFdzLH2QR62qd2RG-rKHjzjcBItQyl2R6qxbtwNaRHrhWxaSMPMKof2XzD9MxKuB7SZ9TD6vZLEyHC9eCb8QXbGHVKDsL_Uor79XMNMkTOI_3PHPEocn6LgS&c=3RX1I7fnkMXjX0tJjJrKs2Yn3nTAEEY6si9S28GOdLkr5dIHggC8-g==&ch=yJ8SHgcI9NIMzF-5evqLVdNuRv8mF0FZFWQObdgc1Yn9yJbsD08gBw==) Friend,

Oh, the places they'll go, but we never thought the 'woke' would end up here.

_**[Did you see the latest?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHi9UE2HlD2Njx6uZmOskUcNZa5Fw3BBq8G3VkioOfmxpCoRrrMLJpPUxE1q6mx79AVMdWEy4Ofr92Dwaxwh-UcyLvgzpn2IBjH6AE-tl4TrrM9UL4zUkli1K-UQ_YeTY0RIz_5rJhAk0CCc5V0LLxKKQ2kjXJBsrLO-5C0Oe4IizTRJdVIRk7bos_M1McHCPo4AECPphyL9FnNusJ2SvYkbWTmMY_nPjN4Ls66uuXtWmbFcrg1-xLkJCIapsxRhP5etZGLHyUrJ-jVZYOhDGRop_dJP93zTO8du8D2uSRWMn6zgRRISMwdARHGkeMQXuAqDVjDWuCz24d7nd4sSnaCDD9BS3oa5GZGnyEe9xFdzLH2QR62qd2RG-rKHjzjcBItQyl2R6qxbtwNaRHrhWxaSMPMKof2XzD9MxKuB7SZ9TD6vZLEyHC9eCb8QXbGHVKDsL_Uor79XMNMkTOI_3PHPEocn6LgS&c=3RX1I7fnkMXjX0tJjJrKs2Yn3nTAEEY6si9S28GOdLkr5dIHggC8-g==&ch=yJ8SHgcI9NIMzF-5evqLVdNuRv8mF0FZFWQObdgc1Yn9yJbsD08gBw==) **_After ignoring data, science, and the CDC -- Loudoun County Public Schools, one of Virginia's largest school districts, is more focused on caving to special interests and CANCELLING Dr. Seuss than OPENING our schools.

[_**We 've had enough!**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHi9UE2HlD2Njx6uZmOskUcNZa5Fw3BBq8G3VkioOfmxpCoRrrMLJpPUxE1q6mx79AVMdWEy4Ofr92Dwaxwh-UcyLvgzpn2IBjH6AE-tl4TrrM9UL4zUkli1K-UQ_YeTY0RIz_5rJhAk0CCc5V0LLxKKQ2kjXJBsrLO-5C0Oe4IizTRJdVIRk7bos_M1McHCPo4AECPphyL9FnNusJ2SvYkbWTmMY_nPjN4Ls66uuXtWmbFcrg1-xLkJCIapsxRhP5etZGLHyUrJ-jVZYOhDGRop_dJP93zTO8du8D2uSRWMn6zgRRISMwdARHGkeMQXuAqDVjDWuCz24d7nd4sSnaCDD9BS3oa5GZGnyEe9xFdzLH2QR62qd2RG-rKHjzjcBItQyl2R6qxbtwNaRHrhWxaSMPMKof2XzD9MxKuB7SZ9TD6vZLEyHC9eCb8QXbGHVKDsL_Uor79XMNMkTOI_3PHPEocn6LgS&c=3RX1I7fnkMXjX0tJjJrKs2Yn3nTAEEY6si9S28GOdLkr5dIHggC8-g==&ch=yJ8SHgcI9NIMzF-5evqLVdNuRv8mF0FZFWQObdgc1Yn9yJbsD08gBw==) Have you?

While it is clear that I do not like wokeness _**here, there, or anywhere**_ -- this is just a step too far.

_Contribute $10 or more today, and I will sign a copy of a Dr. Seuss classic and mail it to you as a gift._ **[**CHIP IN $10 -> GET A FREE BOOK**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHi9UE2HlD2Njx6uZmOskUcNZa5Fw3BBq8G3VkioOfmxpCoRrrMLJpPUxE1q6mx7VE_hNuuKHRp_ad5rCHdcvBTfRvixEiw6KcBbsyqE5w5W80HeXUVH8Sh-phwhLfbXdWoGC4RNW6qV6FQCNnLo7GgIAgPRv0BZeXaK0LX_tgYtoUG6aK23uJVrSGc2LLLU3ZksDQvw4zG50GLm2DdrPlbLbKqPcPd5tpNeRBjqFu3ZU6kdwY0Z7vOp7V2YcBQGiP9Z6BunMIvJPyVBqhf0Kh4dxetlgPobBDEqYjVv4Oa87MV1V1eetGpeo4UwIJcdLve5MAh07zqZwI3IundfI1EUw4oXgg1f31j0c-wT4nCxJMdwSzuaZv7UmiUepYrsJKglhHoaBOoEqnLl0ePfg70q--Ol6LDT87a6UuaEDnN3A-qMOYGvDn_3_9dcZOloZIi9Ds28cKAp8EaujsNFcV5MwyrCATTB&c=3RX1I7fnkMXjX0tJjJrKs2Yn3nTAEEY6si9S28GOdLkr5dIHggC8-g==&ch=yJ8SHgcI9NIMzF-5evqLVdNuRv8mF0FZFWQObdgc1Yn9yJbsD08gBw==)** Enough is _ENOUGH_. Northam, McAuliffe and Virginia's career politicians are FAILING our kids, their parents and our teachers. By creating diversions like this to APPEASE the 'woke' left, **they hope we 'll be distracted enough not to notice THAT OUR SCHOOLS AREN'T EVEN OPEN!** **[**CHIP IN $10 -> GET A FREE BOOK**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHi9UE2HlD2Njx6uZmOskUcNZa5Fw3BBq8G3VkioOfmxpCoRrrMLJpPUxE1q6mx7VE_hNuuKHRp_ad5rCHdcvBTfRvixEiw6KcBbsyqE5w5W80HeXUVH8Sh-phwhLfbXdWoGC4RNW6qV6FQCNnLo7GgIAgPRv0BZeXaK0LX_tgYtoUG6aK23uJVrSGc2LLLU3ZksDQvw4zG50GLm2DdrPlbLbKqPcPd5tpNeRBjqFu3ZU6kdwY0Z7vOp7V2YcBQGiP9Z6BunMIvJPyVBqhf0Kh4dxetlgPobBDEqYjVv4Oa87MV1V1eetGpeo4UwIJcdLve5MAh07zqZwI3IundfI1EUw4oXgg1f31j0c-wT4nCxJMdwSzuaZv7UmiUepYrsJKglhHoaBOoEqnLl0ePfg70q--Ol6LDT87a6UuaEDnN3A-qMOYGvDn_3_9dcZOloZIi9Ds28cKAp8EaujsNFcV5MwyrCATTB&c=3RX1I7fnkMXjX0tJjJrKs2Yn3nTAEEY6si9S28GOdLkr5dIHggC8-g==&ch=yJ8SHgcI9NIMzF-5evqLVdNuRv8mF0FZFWQObdgc1Yn9yJbsD08gBw==)**
But I haven't lost focus, and I will not give up. I made a promise to fight to get our schools open five days a week, with teachers in every classroom **IMMEDIATELY**.

I cannot do this without your help. [**Can I count on you to chip in $25, $15, even $5 to help in the important and necessary fight to #OpenOurSchools and kick the far-left and their outrageous proposals out of power in November?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHi9UE2HlD2Njx6uZmOskUcNZa5Fw3BBq8G3VkioOfmxpCoRrrMLJpPUxE1q6mx79AVMdWEy4Ofr92Dwaxwh-UcyLvgzpn2IBjH6AE-tl4TrrM9UL4zUkli1K-UQ_YeTY0RIz_5rJhAk0CCc5V0LLxKKQ2kjXJBsrLO-5C0Oe4IizTRJdVIRk7bos_M1McHCPo4AECPphyL9FnNusJ2SvYkbWTmMY_nPjN4Ls66uuXtWmbFcrg1-xLkJCIapsxRhP5etZGLHyUrJ-jVZYOhDGRop_dJP93zTO8du8D2uSRWMn6zgRRISMwdARHGkeMQXuAqDVjDWuCz24d7nd4sSnaCDD9BS3oa5GZGnyEe9xFdzLH2QR62qd2RG-rKHjzjcBItQyl2R6qxbtwNaRHrhWxaSMPMKof2XzD9MxKuB7SZ9TD6vZLEyHC9eCb8QXbGHVKDsL_Uor79XMNMkTOI_3PHPEocn6LgS&c=3RX1I7fnkMXjX0tJjJrKs2Yn3nTAEEY6si9S28GOdLkr5dIHggC8-g==&ch=yJ8SHgcI9NIMzF-5evqLVdNuRv8mF0FZFWQObdgc1Yn9yJbsD08gBw==)

clean_body: We came up short and missed our February fundraising goal. But.... ** . == Friend, I wish we had better news to report after our fundraising deadline last night, but I'm afraid the news isn't good. We came up short and missed our February fundraising goal. Now, the Democrats are now more energized to spend from their deep pockets and try to flip this seat from red to blue. This is disappointing, but there is still an upside: we can still catch up to where we need to be, but only with your help. There is no time to lose, so we need to act fast. == == | == == Last year, Michelle was able to defeat Nancy Pelosi's hand-picked candidate because of the determination and support from patriots like you. Even though the deck was stacked against her and nearly every analysis slated her to lose, we proved them wrong. Friend, we need to keep this momentum going. Now is not the time to be complacent. She is all-in if you are too. Let's stand up to the Far Left's socialist agenda and get our country back on track. == == == ==** Together we can make sure conservative voices are heard, and that common sense solutions prevail. Thank you for your support, Team Steel HQ With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: One Year of Emergency Powers?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Do you remember "Give us 15 days to slow the spread"?! We are approaching the one-year anniversary of that lie. We are approaching one whole year of Governor Walz' unilateral declaration of Emergency Powers.** These lies have led to businesses being closed down, healthy people ordered to stay in their homes, youth athletes to wear masks while playing sports, AND Covid positive patients admitted back to long term care facilities. Our team is working around the clock to try and stop the one-year anniversary from happening. It's absolutely amazing that we are here right now! Almost makes one think there is something bigger, and more nefarious at play. **The only way to stop politicians from taking our liberties is to hit them where it hurts - putting our message right in front of their voters. Which is why we just hired two more doorknockers and moved them up into Con Artist Dave Lislegard's district. And that pressure is****putting him and Julie Sandstede on the Defense!** Did you see that both legislators wrote [guests columns](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=UzxBEzGoayeHd1WPFO-VsytmHVRx0LEvSE6MSwFr96izGKgJsEnl3sZoWzJc4RxN_veVZg0_UYzyS7XXZ0uryJz92gY7lxBPbYVJo8zkQuoO3MFJiGBCxrve_1mZ1QJn8OyrU7nWlnQUN0DYJN5YiO_i5CJmVCJJ_Koh798ayU6LEz-UlLNl8EYWjmQZHBA3&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=2) in the Hibbing paper trying to save face with their voters. From Dave Lislegard: _You’ve likely seen literature or heard radio**advertising from Action 4 Liberty** , a group based in the Twin Cities working day and night – during a time when our nation is already deeply divided – to agitate people, including those on the Iron Range._
## This means one thing. OUR PRESSURE IS WORKING!
We now have two different homes up north and I just hired another couple doorknockers. Our team is signing up new petition signers, talking to thousands of voters and distributing lit in all the neighborhoods. Even Dave Lislegard admits we are working around the clock to get our message out to voters. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=3) **Did you know that Julie Sandstede won her election by only 30 votes last November and President Trump won Dave Lislegard's district? By the time we're done with this, we'll have easily identified enough voters to flip those districts red!** Speaking of flipping districts, the Democrat machine is getting really worried that the legislature finally has a liberty champion who is willing to take the fight to them. They HATE our guy, Rep Erik Mortensen. Just last Thursday, Walz' rubber stamp and mask mandate cheerleader, Brad Tabke, announced he is running against Mort. Who announces a campaign this early? Looks like they have set our guy in the crosshairs. This battle is far too important to lose to the Democrat machine. We now know that Emergency Powers will be used and abused by tyrants. That's why we are working day and night to End Walz' Emergency Powers. And with Mort in office, we'll lead the fight to make sure it NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN! There are still more volunteer opportunities up in the Iron Range if you are looking to get more involved. Please [reach out](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=4) if you would like to join our field team to door knock. **If you don't have the time, your support means a lot to our team. We want to keep the momentum and continue holding these politicians accountable. We're quickly approaching the One-Year Anniversary of Walz' Emergency Powers. Let's STOP him from making them permanent.[Support our field operations today](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=5).** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=8), software for leaders.

Our finance team has just informed us that we are still short of our fundraising goal for the month of February and to make sure we hit our mark, the deadline has been extended by ONE DAY. Joe Biden has already gotten away with so much over the past few weeks. | | Hi ,

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the Chair of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. We are taking on the Swamp and pushing the America First agenda forward! [Now more than ever, we need you in that fight!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=7dec107eb3&e=ba6e67b849)

Joe Biden's agenda is awful. Socialist, anti-science, censoring, unconstitutional.

His "COVID" relief bill has only 8% to do with COVID. The other 92% is a bunch of left wing special interest giveaways!

**_As bad as that is, his social engineering agenda might be worse._**

The "Equality Act", just passed by Pelosi's Dem House, is a gift to pedophiles everywhere. Check this out:

_"80 to 95 percent of children with gender dysphoria no longer feel distressed by their bodies after puberty. Yet activists continue to push their own radical protocol: social transition as young as 4, puberty blocking drugs as young as 9, cross-sex hormones as young as 14, and surgery by 18 (or, in some cases, even younger). _

_By silencing the scientific debate on transgender-affirming therapies through the politicization of medicine, the Equality Act would further normalize this radical protocol, and create an expectation that parents comply.

In fact, parents in Ohio lost custody of their seventeen-year-old daughter because they declined to put her on testosterone supplements."_

That's right- this "Act" pushes gender changing drugs, untested and unapproved by the FDA, on children as young as 3- without parental consent.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: NEW: Separating Trump from Trumpism is Key to the GOP's Future
body:
Since his November loss, no one worked harder to get rid of Donald Trump than Donald Trump. Right up until the end, he was his own worst enemy. [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0688b014f6034c72a6724e6499903c64&_e=RxOCXKbjH_SF3EOij7XYdur1AwfRt6aTLKvxKJzmiujgcj3W-bsqTRYMjhSV72YtgUIomdzQ659jxwRTrB0xWk9qPdNMNACzBX0EeHq6RDj7qd7ZdklkNEBmD1Ghk2FN0ihuf6onXRT_dx73nD-F4IDxs4sHejScTHdk61ft6nXgUEwaHX1Irq5x616zgBXE8_7WP5JE0o0nD9jNksQtzOlDn3p6TcxSu2g4QXF4Bxdyi0fGKiF0n93WjeU9tKLGfFLQ8ON0yyM5bMtXFYtgDQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Fellow American,

I hope you get a chance to read my latest piece on Newsweek.com, "[Separating Trump from Trumpism is Key to the GOP's Future](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0688b014f6034c72a6724e6499903c64&_e=RxOCXKbjH_SF3EOij7XYdptVoNsEYs_jrh5C7jW-0bV8cbmCQtT_dHhH130g0pdc7RLFKQVraCW-Y7Dz-W6z0d4f75JKdLmPwkZThZVN4XCuWuJht6XsTUGwKSiUw9KUbBJ-g_g8icoxhQO6MjrSqHfYKDFTaUNPiQCZdbNPQGJljnPAQ8aSS8pNEa-ETL-yomXH3loFy_XNBTEvZMQAgyUeos2v1Eo8sESTw1qUgGRqRQERugRE0CK9_sdl-Az1iSHP4-FnwZBijP1ggXPbJ9tCtSwuad2_TE5Ss6zhbUbedXLxSfROTJPWrpnel_JkwCw5RCdZUwc0u1jrjKCN6Q%3D%3D)."

Check out an excerpt below, and click the link to read the full article.

Thank you,

Bobby Jindal

|
---
**Separating Trump from Trumpism is Key to the GOP's Future**
|
---
Since his November loss, no one worked harder to get rid of Donald Trump than Donald Trump. Right up until the end, he was his own worst enemy. But though he left the White House under a dark cloud, facing a historic second impeachment, Trump has not been completely defeated. As long as he remains the exclusive representative of Trumpism, he will be the most popular Republican in the country. Unless the GOP creates an alternative version of Trumpism, without Trump, he'll be back.

Trump was undone by his own predatory nature. His modus operandi was to always fight back and attack. If he did not, he was convinced, he would appear weak and lose anyway. That strategy worked for him—until it didn't.

What limits did his adversaries imagine he would respect? Since he was sworn in, the media worked to delegitimize his presidency and his administration. Democrats weaponized the FBI and intelligence agencies for political purposes. The Left politicized the People's House to impeach him and attempt to nullify the 2016 election. So, why not try to reverse the 2020 election?

...
[**CLICK _HERE_ TO READ THE FULL ARTICLE**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0688b014f6034c72a6724e6499903c64&_e=RxOCXKbjH_SF3EOij7XYdptVoNsEYs_jrh5C7jW-0bV8cbmCQtT_dHhH130g0pdc7RLFKQVraCW-Y7Dz-W6z0d4f75JKdLmPwkZThZVN4XCuWuJht6XsTUGwKSiUw9KULSX2l9Fg3cVWpWMHa1Jo-_WZ88eWTF_dIHy7PEFBZoV9RKDZ7zipgNzWQ3SzLI8TYk9_u099aXh1McMU11S9ZR10AfAHBMW1SOFjxXB8AFQEuPBZmC186ppuU7IiF_3FdZ6SgyMHMRc8iXDv0hiscrCHW3Yh7BDjcOTaTKfMJzZDsW2sXGLKMSV3lXZCMLbnnN-YnZ9_gDot33bwIUhgDQ%3D%3D)

name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: Honored to Participate at CPAC!
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.179714.aspx)
Dear Peter,
Friends, I was invited to participate in two discussion panels this past week at CPAC. I was incredibly honored by the opportunity! Let me tell you something - our conservative ideals are still igniting passion and action throughout this great Country!
As some of you know, the Supreme Court denied us the opportunity to plead our case regarding this past election - BUT that doesn't mean that we are done fighting! I promise, to each and every one of you, to keep our conservative values at the forefront of every decision I make in Congress.
**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.179714.aspx)
_P.S. _You can like our [Facebook ](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.179714.aspx)page [](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.179714.aspx) , follow us on [Twitter](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.179714.aspx) [](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.179714.aspx) , or contribute to my campaign at [www.mikekellyforcongress.com](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.179714.aspx). name: Team RonJon
subject: Bad news first...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
This is bad... we failed to reach our February end-of-month goal, putting the future of Wisconsin AND the Senate in jeopardy.

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. clean_body: Dems call voter security voter suppression ** Friend, Look at how ridiculous this National Democratic Redistricting Committee email is. They think secure elections are suppressed elections. It's actually laughable! Meanwhile, they warn about "manipulated maps" via an email address called Democratic Redistricting , from a committee whose logo is LITERALLY a manipulated map that gerrymanders Dems into power. They want to choose their voters -- not the other way around. == == \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: "Ben Deutsch, NDRC" == Date: Thursday, February 18, 2021 Subject: Defend our Elections Friend -- Republicans are taking their voter suppression campaign nationwide. ➞ The RNC has created a special panel on "election integrity" ➞ And the Republican State Leadership Committee -- the group that helped manipulate the maps in 2011 -- has a new project to bring restrictive laws to every state According to Fox News, "The new move by the RNC comes as GOP state lawmakers in three battleground states where Biden narrowly edged Trump -- Arizona, Georgia, and Pennsylvania -- are pushing to tighten voting restrictions on mail-in balloting in future contests." It's pretty clear what's happening here, team. Republicans are furious about losing in 2020, and instead of changing their positions or reaching new voters, their strategy is to shrink the electorate. This is a stark example of the "erosion of democracy" President Obama warned us about. The NDRC is committed to speaking out against Republican voter suppression nationwide and working on the ground to prevent gerrymandering in 2021. But we need your help. Will you pitch in to give us the resources to oppose restrictive voting laws and manipulated maps this year? name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Did you see our previous email? We need your feedback for the next two years!
body:
| |
---
I wanted to make sure you saw the recent email about our goals for the next two years, as well as our need for your feedback at this critical time. We accidentally added the wrong subject line to the email, and it may have been lost in the shuffle because of this. I’m resending the email (below) because I want to ensure that doesn’t happen. Please take a look over it and click [one of the links](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYwLWQ1YWQzN2ZlZTdlZTQwYzliNDExMjYxOTJkMzZjMmZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvMjAyMS0yMDIyLWFjdGlvbi1wbGFucy8_bWlkPTQzNDM4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=9dndKNU78bdRO4MsIFgjbg) to fill out your survey give us your feed back.

If you have any problems with the completing the survey, simply reply to this email and we will try our best to make sure we get your thoughts on what you think our plans should be for 2021–2022.

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---
Thank you for being a supporter of Tea Party Patriots Action. You are our activists, donors, members, and supporters who care about personal freedom, economic freedom, and a debt free future.

In January, we asked you what you want to see Tea Party Patriots Action do during the next two years, and what areas we could improve. We heard from thousands of you. In the last few weeks, we read your feedback, considered the issues that concern you the most, and used your suggestions to form our plans for 2021–2022.

**For 2022, our goal is to increase the number of Americans who will act on, stand for, and cast votes based on a legislative agenda that puts America first, values personal freedom and economic freedom, and supports free markets rather than socialist policies.**

To achieve the goal, **[with your feedback](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYwLWQ1YWQzN2ZlZTdlZTQwYzliNDExMjYxOTJkMzZjMmZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvMjAyMS0yMDIyLWFjdGlvbi1wbGFucy8_bWlkPTQzNDM4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=hX0CC-2cqNx9cCygYyF0rQ)** , we will:
**1\. Recruit, educate, and equip concerned citizens to become engaged activists**
1. Launch an educational series that explains how individual concerned citizens can move up a ladder of activist engagement.
2. Assist supporters in organizing, engaging, and building relationships at the local level to educate and inform others of the importance of our values and issues.
3. As we grow our engaged activists and grassroots leaders, weekly action items will gradually focus more on neighborhood and precinct organizing efforts.
_NOTE: Due to COVID and various state and local restrictions, we will work on educating individuals more than on building specific local groups._

**2\. Educate and engage to ensure each and every legal vote is counted – no more, no less**
_To ensure Americans have hope for the future and faith they can make a difference in the political process in this country, we must have faith in the outcome of elections, regardless of who wins or loses._
1. Work at a state level to educate on necessary changes to improve election integrity, and, where appropriate, give action items to help enact those changes legislatively.
2. Expand poll watcher training program to recruit, train, and deploy poll workers, poll watchers, and public observers in key states for early voting and Election Day voting.
3. Stand for safeguards to prevent election fraud, including voter id, increased checks and balances on mail-in voting, and voter registration process.
4. Oppose HR 1, which we refer to as the For Politicians Act.

**3\. Educate often and engage on national issues that are important to our cause**
_To persuade opinion effectively and answer questions from those we want to influence, we must understand why we support or oppose an issue, bill, or regulation. To elevate the importance of an issue with the public, from time to time we must take coordinated action._
1. Focus educational efforts on the following foundational issues: election integrity (as mentioned above), free speech, healthcare freedom, rule of law, border security, economic freedom, free markets and capitalism, and constitutional freedoms versus socialism.
2. Educational methods include documentaries, webpages, short videos, video interviews with experts, social media memes, webinars, and emails.
3. Engage on legislative issues related to the foundational issues with coordinated calls to action to melt phone lines, write letters to editor, wave signs, etc.
4. Premiere and launch two documentaries to educate about free markets versus socialism.
5. Revamp, rebrand, and relaunch weekly livestream and podcast to better educate and inform our supporters and activists.
6. Expand ThePatriotProject.com news website.

**4\. Activate base to get out the vote based on our values in 2022**
1. Activists will send handwritten, personalized postcards and letters to voters in the general election cycle in 2022. In 2022, our goal is 3 million personalized voter-to-voter postcards and 750,000 personal letters to voters.
2. Send 10 million text messages and phone calls to voters.

**[Please use this link](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYwLWQ1YWQzN2ZlZTdlZTQwYzliNDExMjYxOTJkMzZjMmZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvMjAyMS0yMDIyLWFjdGlvbi1wbGFucy8_bWlkPTQzNDM4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=-UU7a4aoirHg4HX6KBsYuQ)** to give your feedback on the broad action plans for 2021 and 2022.
[GIVE YOUR FEEDBACK](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYwLWQ1YWQzN2ZlZTdlZTQwYzliNDExMjYxOTJkMzZjMmZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvMjAyMS0yMDIyLWFjdGlvbi1wbGFucy8_bWlkPTQzNDM4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=-YTstZDXEHb2a5n6nItEIQ)
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYwLWQ1YWQzN2ZlZTdlZTQwYzliNDExMjYxOTJkMzZjMmZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDM0MzgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=UKMYJUz58tUj7q3LbKj8BA)
|
---

80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003

**[View This Email in a Browser](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b21060-d5ad37fee7ee40c9b41126192d36c2fb/88/831/c60b31ec-bfcb-4d91-a522-30ce156c3f55)** | **[Manage Subscriptions or Unsubscribe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYwLWQ1YWQzN2ZlZTdlZTQwYzliNDExMjYxOTJkMzZjMmZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9teS50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9jb21tdW5pY2F0aW9uLXByZWZlcmVuY2VzP2lkPVQxOG85dzBldWpLb2s4bVFBUSZtaWQ9NDM0MzgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=yJr8HbgFHiieA-mm8qlGfA)**

name: Trump Alerts (Via NRCC)
subject: Trump showed up for us yesterday. Can you show up for him?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
After protecting our borders, passing historic tax cuts, and putting America FIRST, we need to let President Trump know that we are still standing strong with him.

Did you see President Trump's historic speech yesterday?

The Left didn't want Trump to break his silence, but his performance at CPAC was as strong as ever. He SHOWED UP for our America First movement and conservative patriots like you.

After protecting our borders, passing historic tax cuts, and putting America FIRST, we need to let President Trump know that we are still standing strong with him.

_**He showed up for us yesterday. Can you show up for him?**_

[**STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZIOwcHC9AVq9xi0WIBQsKpLIrPeJxw7ozUgfLaJ7VRBJU1vOJerCWGzAaoc1h0dWdf5TdPXyyzPnh_fUa0fQ2iu1SjFOAG-wISBHIWuxg0n9gLQrrz9maM7ttwg2EBdgSUZ1-6O7-pIjiPWqd-LgoGUio2BunpcbDoBuYqQgEt3vGBdEpME4G-n7Du_y1UjXjBOdxLP9d_N8vYMGarXvCrq4oNZiWKX6Gdp92zlDxAe2PPNkchqT76tDvV586e_1gwLIP7JJrdxOLHtrVFPMeL50QyhIxVt9BbGO66eq7woE3-JVxZiJYZaNgbQ0JDCjFzxHkkIfog20acIj59SDW3nm-xy8dEtU0ES3V1XICrqvvbuYQwzBJof4AD0NhBM7nw2pS6qUjWxTn-aHQ3V0ls76lr0EGC3TiswEzdz2AdjxkhTSjt97KJVJZxPlOiF45i1NGVwXSrwBn2FgsWTjtPtRnEg8lyeZ&c=a5rjAK7ViF7upSRDi8IbCx3xHNKtl0L7zLM5P1zagZXWf7ftx7JKXg==&ch=0OaAqmhtz97kxjs8x_-3Ipww1Gad0rTH1k4YfbW3F9QPgpJKPzPhNg==)

House Democrats know they have to go on offense. While Pelosi is busy hosting fundraisers with dark money Mega Donors and Silicon Valley billionaires, President Trump is STILL fighting for YOU and our strong conservative values.

_Can you take just a minute to thank President Trump for all his hard work?_

[**STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZIOwcHC9AVq9xi0WIBQsKpLIrPeJxw7ozUgfLaJ7VRBJU1vOJerCWGzAaoc1h0dWdf5TdPXyyzPnh_fUa0fQ2iu1SjFOAG-wISBHIWuxg0n9gLQrrz9maM7ttwg2EBdgSUZ1-6O7-pIjiPWqd-LgoGUio2BunpcbDoBuYqQgEt3vGBdEpME4G-n7Du_y1UjXjBOdxLP9d_N8vYMGarXvCrq4oNZiWKX6Gdp92zlDxAe2PPNkchqT76tDvV586e_1gwLIP7JJrdxOLHtrVFPMeL50QyhIxVt9BbGO66eq7woE3-JVxZiJYZaNgbQ0JDCjFzxHkkIfog20acIj59SDW3nm-xy8dEtU0ES3V1XICrqvvbuYQwzBJof4AD0NhBM7nw2pS6qUjWxTn-aHQ3V0ls76lr0EGC3TiswEzdz2AdjxkhTSjt97KJVJZxPlOiF45i1NGVwXSrwBn2FgsWTjtPtRnEg8lyeZ&c=a5rjAK7ViF7upSRDi8IbCx3xHNKtl0L7zLM5P1zagZXWf7ftx7JKXg==&ch=0OaAqmhtz97kxjs8x_-3Ipww1Gad0rTH1k4YfbW3F9QPgpJKPzPhNg==)

Here's the thing, Patriot. We only need to win FIVE seats to take back the House and continue President Trump's America First agenda. Yesterday, he told us how important it is to keep our momentum going. We can't do that without your immediate support.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: Huge Laura Loomer breaking news be the 1st to know!
body:
Did you hear about the recent huge announcements from Laura Loomer, Donald Trump, and Ron Desantis that have an impact on you? | | | **I wanted to tell you first !**
---
| |
---
| |
---
#### Dear Patriot,

I want you to be the first to know that I have filed to run for US Congress again in Florida’s 21st Congressional District, home to President Donald Trump, for the 2022 election cycle. In doing so, I am once again putting the Big-Tech Tyrants, the radical left, and members of the elite DC Political establishment-Swamp on notice.
---
| I am sending you this message from CPAC in Orlando, Florida where I just watched President Trump give his first speech since leaving office. At CPAC this year, the theme is ironically “America Uncanceled”. I am deeply honored by the outpouring of support I received from all of you during my last campaign, and I humbly request your continued support during my 2022 campaign so I can continue to fight for you and America. [_CLICK TO DONATE_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=83f69b43e7&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
| Americans are aware that for years, I have been patient zero in Big-Tech’s plot to silence and censor conservative voices and interfere in our elections. Candidates have come to depend on social media to efficiently and effectively get their messages to voters, fundraise, advertise, and participate in public discourse. As the **most banned woman in the world** and the first de-platformed candidate in US history, I know firsthand of the dangers this poses to personal liberty, our constitutional right to free speech, free and fair elections, and the concept of sovereign nations.
---
| |
---
Americans are now just learning about how dangerous Big Tech’s unchecked power has become after these Silicon Valley companies coordinated to de-platform Donald J. Trump, while he was still a sitting US President, from social media, the internet, and even the banking systems. [_Will you help?_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=678eaee086&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
| We need leaders in Congress like myself who actually understand this vital issue of Big-Tech censorship and the way it impacts the lives of Americans and the integrity of our elections. [_**Donate today**_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=e57d05fb78&e=4d7c0901a7) to help me launch my 2022 campaign and break up the Big-Tech monopolies.
---
| If Big Tech is permitted to collude for the sake of blocking conservatives and their chosen candidates from participating in and discussing political issues in the digital public square, then they must face criminal charges for their outright election interference which violates the bedrock of our democracy, both here in America and world-wide. The only way a candidate has a chance to win when this occurs, is with overwhelming financial donations (small and large) and on-the-ground grassroots support from patriotic, generous, and devoted supporters and donors like yourself from all over the country. [_**Can I count on your HELP?**_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=ba651698be&e=4d7c0901a7) **Without Social Media and equal access to payment processors, my campaign has been forced to use alternatives and sometimes more costly mechanisms to communicate our vital America First platform with voters. **
---
| Despite being challenged by the economic impacts of COVID-19, my incredible supporters and donors, which includes **YOU** , helped my campaign raise much appreciated donations to mount an aggressive campaign with limited face-to-face ability that won a crowded primary with six candidates, and had an _impressive finish in the general election against entrenched, radical Democrat incumbent Lois Frankel_.
---
| This amazing effort was only possible because of generous supporters like **yourself** , and endorsements from President Trump, Judge Jeanine Pirro, Rep. Matt Gaetz, Rep. Paul Gosar, Roger Stone, General Flynn, “Bo Snerdley”, and more! People never would have imagined that Big-Tech’s efforts, _**which have gone unchecked by Congress for years**_ , would accelerate to target elected officials, including the President of the United States, arguably the most powerful person in the world!
---
| I always knew this would happen, and I was warning voters on the campaign trail in 2020, and years before, that if they could silence me, they would silence President Trump, which means **YOU** could be next! **It was just said yesterday at CPAC by President Trump that "Trump's endorsement is the most powerful endorsement in politics.". I am proud to have earned President Trump's endorsement and his vote as the Republican nominee for Congress in FL CD 21 in 2020. FL 21 is the home to President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump. **

I am without question the leading expert on this issue and I need your [_**help**_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=9714643957&e=4d7c0901a7) to get to Congress to fight against Big-Tech censorship, voter fraud, and the many other issues important to Americans and small business owners who have experienced unimaginable challenges and losses over the last year as we have witnessed unconstitutional mandates and lock downs that threaten our God given rights and Constitutional freedoms. Big-Tech censorship and election interference is hands-down the most important issue facing America, because if we are silenced, and the Big-Tech tyrants get to choose election winners and losers via censorship, then we will never again have a free and fair election in America! This is one of the main reasons why I have immediately filed to run for Congress again and need your support. **Help my campaign reach our first fundraising goal of $100,000 by donating [_here_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=93216012db&e=4d7c0901a7) today! **
---
| We need your help to break fundraising records beyond that goal to send a message to Big-Tech that we _won’t tolerate their cancel culture and election interference anymore!_ Be a part of making history and help us shatter our goal by clicking _[here](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=2e26ca63fa&e=4d7c0901a7)._
---
| Thank you so much for your support,
---
|
---
| | Laura Loomer
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 www.LauraLoomerForCongress.com, All rights reserved._

Laura Loomer for Congress, Inc.
720 Lucerne Ave #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=c87a6002c3&e=4d7c0901a7&c=5f414849cd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=c87a6002c3&e=4d7c0901a7&c=5f414849cd).
---

name: Tate Reeves
subject: No More Bailouts: If My State Can Save For Emergencies Like COVID, So Can Others
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
There is no reason states that were unwilling to make the hard calls and trim spending before the pandemic can't make the right decisions now. [](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=d8c67a88b1d040a0885483426a49c9f1&_e=Vo9vMiGimjJlkpnz203h43oea3K9I-Fc9h7ZEFHWKO5-auyRfo9f8lRtEKzW8v5m8tTxaQ1LGdREE4IKEoMqm6hcOFDKqKQPRjQq0e-ES6fcirC9PTeIzZaoeFjojuq7SVo9aYX6TrSXEfNSdKTZjRw9UGP-V5UmcyhDL9mdNJSkc2ErDkJ2MryDvzDd6dHBl2L7CWLkS6GyQBZnbG1Mzabed_NdqFjxZCOGil9qztn7Yb_emKUMgpYdUbdDYAVsIr4OI5l-aei6n-HrISvunVnJGWdy5OsQdOaIzxMqXidLCw5R5rbQAwnTpWjz6lG9strhiH_YU5PeG5zhn3AEiNgI2VPoa1xI6PHDufz6oXg%3D) | |
---
**No More Bailouts: If My State Can Save For Emergencies Like COVID, So Can Others**

_There is no reason states that were unwilling to make the hard calls and trim spending before the pandemic can't make the right decisions now._
|
---
The Biden administration and Congress are negotiating a federal coronavirus spending package, and while it has many worthy goals, one thing should be eliminated: bailing out state budgets.

If they pass the billions of dollars in bailout money for state governments, as a governor, I’d get the political benefit of spending that money. It’s never unpopular. The most politically expedient thing for me to do right now would be to keep my head down and my hand out.

I have serious concerns, however, about the attitude towards unlimited spending in Washington. I publicly expressed concerns about the previous round of state bailout funds. This time around, it seems even more gratuitous.

I’m currently the governor of Mississippi, but I also hold the Chartered Financial Analyst designation, and I spent the last eight years trying to make budgets balance in our legislature. First and foremost, I’m a numbers guy, and the numbers on this bailout just don’t work.

State governments should have been preparing for a crisis like this before it arrived, rather than spending recklessly. In Mississippi, that’s exactly what we did. We deliberately filled our rainy-day fund to its statutory capacity over my time leading the Mississippi Senate as lieutenant governor. I was attacked for being stingy and not spreading money around to popular programs. Ahead of my 2019 run for governor, those stances cost me politically.

Many of my friends and allies — not to mention my critics — lobbied me to spend on worthy causes. Who cares about a rainy-day fund when times are good? There are raises to give and projects to fund! But our discipline in Mississippi has made all the difference in the last 12 months. We’ve had to make some modest cutbacks due to COVID-19, but nothing like the doomsday scenarios portrayed in many other states.

The fact is, many of these states should have been doing more routine maintenance of their bloated budgets before the crisis came. We’re unafraid of budget cuts here because they happen from time to time.

When we have more revenue coming in, we sock some away and spend the rest. When we don’t, we cut back. That’s what every family and business in America does. But many state governments rely on debt to fund their wish lists on an ongoing basis, and they never see the consequences until it’s too late.

Plenty of states invested in their trust funds and unemployment accounts before the pandemic. It’s not like Mississippi is a unicorn (we’re in the top four, but who’s counting?). The states that decided not to protect their fiscal integrity made a policy decision as well. Now, Congress seems poised to use taxpayer dollars from every state to rescue these profligate states from the consequences once again. This is morally wrong.

It’s not just about budgets and fiscal responsibility. There is a very predictable result of shutting down a state’s economy for months on end, as many “blue” states did. It’s no surprise that there is less economic activity — and tax revenue generated by it — in those states. Indeed, that was their goal.

In Mississippi, our farms and factories never stopped operating. The parts we did slow down, we opened back up as quickly as possible.

The result? Mississippi’s revenue is in pretty great shape considering the global pandemic. Total revenue collections for January fiscal year 2021 were 30 percent above the revenue estimate. In 2020, we attracted 30 percent more capital investment than we saw in 2019. We’ve recovered 103 percent of the jobs we lost at the height of COVID-19’s negative economic effects. We encouraged people to be safe while preserving their rights to shop, dine, work, and live.

State governments that closed their economies and opened their checkbooks are suffering. I have empathy for those governors. We cannot allow the country to continue down the same path, however. What will be the result if we teach states that the only result of reckless spending is a federal bailout? And who will be there holding our federal debt when the federal government finds itself in the same situation?

If federal negotiators are looking to responsibly trim back this behemoth of a federal spending bill, they can look first to the bailout fund. There is no reason states that were unwilling to make unpopular decisions before the pandemic cannot make unpopular decisions now. The bill is due, and prudent states’ taxpayers don’t want to pay for bad choices they didn’t make.
—

Governor Tate Reeves
February 25, 2021
|

clean_body: There is no reason states that were unwilling to make the hard calls and trim spending before the pandemic can't make the right decisions now. | | No More Bailouts: If My State Can Save For Emergencies Like COVID, So Can Others There is no reason states that were unwilling to make the hard calls and trim spending before the pandemic can't make the right decisions now. | The Biden administration and Congress are negotiating a federal coronavirus spending package, and while it has many worthy goals, one thing should be eliminated: bailing out state budgets. If they pass the billions of dollars in bailout money for state governments, as a governor, I’d get the political benefit of spending that money. It’s never unpopular. The most politically expedient thing for me to do right now would be to keep my head down and my hand out. I have serious concerns, however, about the attitude towards unlimited spending in Washington. I publicly expressed concerns about the previous round of state bailout funds. This time around, it seems even more gratuitous. I’m currently the governor of Mississippi, but I also hold the Chartered Financial Analyst designation, and I spent the last eight years trying to make budgets balance in our legislature. First and foremost, I’m a numbers guy, and the numbers on this bailout just don’t work. State governments should have been preparing for a crisis like this before it arrived, rather than spending recklessly. In Mississippi, that’s exactly what we did. We deliberately filled our rainy-day fund to its statutory capacity over my time leading the Mississippi Senate as lieutenant governor. I was attacked for being stingy and not spreading money around to popular programs. Ahead of my 2019 run for governor, those stances cost me politically. Many of my friends and allies — not to mention my critics — lobbied me to spend on worthy causes. Who cares about a rainy-day fund when times are good? There are raises to give and projects to fund! But our discipline in Mississippi has made all the difference in the last 12 months. We’ve had to make some modest cutbacks due to COVID-19, but nothing like the doomsday scenarios portrayed in many other states. The fact is, many of these states should have been doing more routine maintenance of their bloated budgets before the crisis came. We’re unafraid of budget cuts here because they happen from time to time. When we have more revenue coming in, we sock some away and spend the rest. When we don’t, we cut back. That’s what every family and business in America does. But many state governments rely on debt to fund their wish lists on an ongoing basis, and they never see the consequences until it’s too late. Plenty of states invested in their trust funds and unemployment accounts before the pandemic. It’s not like Mississippi is a unicorn (we’re in the top four, but who’s counting?). The states that decided not to protect their fiscal integrity made a policy decision as well. Now, Congress seems poised to use taxpayer dollars from every state to rescue these profligate states from the consequences once again. This is morally wrong. It’s not just about budgets and fiscal responsibility. There is a very predictable result of shutting down a state’s economy for months on end, as many “blue” states did. It’s no surprise that there is less economic activity — and tax revenue generated by it — in those states. Indeed, that was their goal. In Mississippi, our farms and factories never stopped operating. The parts we did slow down, we opened back up as quickly as possible. The result? Mississippi’s revenue is in pretty great shape considering the global pandemic. Total revenue collections for January fiscal year 2021 were 30 percent above the revenue estimate. In 2020, we attracted 30 percent more capital investment than we saw in 2019. We’ve recovered 103 percent of the jobs we lost at the height of COVID-19’s negative economic effects. We encouraged people to be safe while preserving their rights to shop, dine, work, and live. State governments that closed their economies and opened their checkbooks are suffering. I have empathy for those governors. We cannot allow the country to continue down the same path, however. What will be the result if we teach states that the only result of reckless spending is a federal bailout? And who will be there holding our federal debt when the federal government finds itself in the same situation? If federal negotiators are looking to responsibly trim back this behemoth of a federal spending bill, they can look first to the bailout fund. There is no reason states that were unwilling to make unpopular decisions before the pandemic cannot make unpopular decisions now. The bill is due, and prudent states’ taxpayers don’t want to pay for bad choices they didn’t make. — Governor Tate Reeves February 25, 2021 | Paid for by Tate for Governor | | | | ---|---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Tate for Governor P.O. Box 24355, Jackson, MS 39225

body:
!!️!!️!!️ | | | Friend, I’m thrilled to announce that I just added Tom O’Halleran to the DCCC’s list of 2022 Frontline Members – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to protecting our Democratic House Majority next year. name: Tim Kaine
subject: It's time for universal health coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, Even before the pandemic began, our health care system was too costly and provided insufficient care for millions of Americans.

_**But COVID-19 has laid bare the inefficiency of our system. And now, it 's time for us to achieve universal health coverage. **_

That's why last week, I proudly stood alongside Colorado Senator Michael Bennet to reintroduce our Medicare-X plan. Our plan would create a public option built on Medicare. It would make coverage more accessible and more affordable for everyone. **And it would ensure that no American slips through the cracks.** **This is a bold plan -- and I'm proud to stand with Michael in calling for universal coverage. But we need your help to hold on to our Democratic majority in the Senate and get ambitious health care legislation like Medicare-X passed. ** [**Can you chip in $20 or more to support both of us today? Whatever donation you make will be split equally between our two campaigns.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a1e/2496563993/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-bennet?refcode=20210301_fr_tk_mb_split&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+chip+in+20+or+more+to+support+bo&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split") | | **[DONATE](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a1d/2496563993/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-bennet?refcode=20210301_fr_tk_mb_split&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split")**
---
Derek, you don't have to be a political scientist to know that amending our country's massive health care system isn't an easy thing to do. **But the fact is, it 's the right thing to do. **
That's why I'm particularly grateful to Michael Bennet for working so hard with me to make this bold plan a reality -- even with Republican challengers already gunning for his seat in 2022.
[**Michael is always committed to doing the right thing. So today, I hope you'll consider making a contribution of any amount to support both of us, keep him in the Senate, and maintain our Democratic majority.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a1c/2496563993/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-bennet?refcode=20210301_fr_tk_mb_split&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Michael+is+always+committed+to+doing+the&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split")
| **[DONATE](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a13/2496563993/VEsC/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-bennet?refcode=20210301_fr_tk_mb_split&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split")**
---
You can read more about our plan, and how it lowers costs and improves accessibility for every single American, [**here**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a12/2496563993/VEsD/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/meet-the-press/blog/meet-press-blog-latest-news-analysis-data-driving-political-discussion-n988541/ncrd1258139?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split#blogHeader").
Thanks for all you do,

Tim Kaine

---
* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a11/2496563993/VEsA/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a10/2496563993/VEsB/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a17/2496563993/VEsO/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a16/2496563993/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for Tim to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a15/2496563993/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split")

P.O. Box 239
Alexandria, VA 22313-0239

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f172d/3e0906/78669de0/3e303a14/2496563993/VEsHBA/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split&source=20210301_FR_TK_MB_Split")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Outvote=20=28now=20Impactive=29?=
subject: We have a big announcement…
body:
Welcome to the future of organizing. | | | | [Trouble viewing this email? Click to view in browser](https://mailchi.mp/outvote.io/we-have-a-big-announcement-635000?e=0aad15100c)
---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=5682f2cca7&e=0aad15100c)
---
| | Dear Outvote community,

When Outvote was founded in 2017, we never expected how much of an impact we could make in three years. It’s been an incredible journey, from our humble beginnings organizing for local city council races all the way to our massive successes in the 2020 election. With that, we're thrilled to announce the next chapter of our story: **Outvote is now Impactive**.

We’re rebranding to make clear that our mission is to help any and all progressive social impact organizations and advocacy groups. We remain committed to our political and electoral work and also look forward to welcoming many more nonprofit organizations, unions, and others as Impactive partners.

We have a new name and a new look, and new features coming soon. Impactive partners will soon be able to send broadcast text messages to their supporter list, leverage two-click opt-in flows to grow text message subscribers, and track custom short links across each of their actions. In addition, we’ll be adding functionality for users to contact their legislators, and will continue to invest in upgraded administrative features.

If you’re as excited by what comes next as we are, please [join our Impactive mailing list](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=a4ea4aa90f&e=0aad15100c) for the latest on our new features and initiatives.

The fight for a more just society is never over, and we can’t wait to make even more of an impact (!) together.

Onward,
**Naseem Makiya
Founder & CEO, Impactive** _(formerly Outvote)_
---
| | | |
## [Join the Impactive Mailing List](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=ef4a394c8d&e=0aad15100c)
---
| | **Currently volunteering on Outvote?
Here’s what to do. **

The all-new Impactive app is your new home for volunteering. If you have the Outvote app downloaded on your phone, visit the App Store or Google Play Store to upgrade your app to the Impactive release.

[](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=4e0303dbc5&e=0aad15100c) [](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=c057f7a63e&e=0aad15100c)

If you use Outvote on the web, you’ll visit [impactive.io](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=f1f3f262ea&e=0aad15100c) instead of outvote.io. Don’t worry, if you forget our new URL, you’ll automatically be redirected from Outvote!
---
| |
## Any questions?
Check out our _[FAQ here](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=75ea0c17fc&e=0aad15100c)_ to get more information about creating a campaign on Impactive. With any other questions or feedback, feel free to reply to this email!
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=6b7db1b551&e=0aad15100c)
---

name: Flip CA-25
subject: Mike Garcia stinks. We have the receipts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Mike has _never_ been in politics to serve the people, Peter, only partisanship.

**[We'll tell you just why Mike Garcia is the _wrong choice_ to represent the 25th district in Congress, but if you don't need convincing, click here to chip in $25 -- or whatever you can -- to send him packing.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b147/29776869/86dcb8c/569d04e3/3029653859/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAzMDFfZW9tMnJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2103_email_christy?refcode=em21_210301_eom2resend_in&amount=25")**

In two of his _first_ votes in Congress, Mike **voted against expanding health care** through the Affordable Care Act **or extending housing assistance** during a public health and economic crisis unlike anything we've seen in a century.

**He supported Donald Trump even when the former president blamed Californians for the wildfires** that raged last summer and threatened to withhold relief aid.

**He voted to reject electoral college results from Arizona and Pennsylvania** \-- _after_ a Trump-inspired mob stormed the Capitol -- therefore voting to disenfranchise millions of voters for partisan gain.

**He _refused_ to hold Trump accountable** for inciting an insurrection against Congress when Democrats, and 10 members of the GOP, voted to impeach.

**He stood with his pal Marjorie Taylor Greene** and voted to keep her on her committees, despite her history of racism and conspiracy-mongering.

And just this weekend, **he voted against sending American families the relief checks they so desperately need.**

**[Mike Garcia has got to go. Chip in $25, or any amount, to flip the 25th district.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b147/29776869/86dcb8c/569d04fc/3029653859/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAzMDFfZW9tMnJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2103_email_christy?refcode=em21_210301_eom2resend_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b147/29776869/86dcb8c/569d04fd/3029653859/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAzMDFfZW9tMnJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2103_email_christy?refcode=em21_210301_eom2resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b147/29776869/86dcb8c/569d04fe/3029653859/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAzMDFfZW9tMnJlc2VuZF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2103_email_christy?refcode=em21_210301_eom2resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=25")

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: FLASH POLL: Our southern border
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
The Biden Administration has no intention of finishing the wall on our southern border. The Biden Administration has no intention of finishing the wall on our southern border. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7c547d7fe604a43be3eb861bcf0d885&_e=V90gRLQIuMN5oRgY9xcIgEs9E53goMBbwE8RtKTkS9ZybCwTbVCW3i384DWHur29W-rlyx7gpFOUsY4BF-oGJl5rUGv8d4tLYz6muy3qfbUfvPY-yxjeF7hOPeV-Eu_OqJRlVqD2GpcU3KEn0xrLJNKqF1XebPvxuTPTjeOJirO65qvf6pBLpiVRSA8D28JuB04tYXAznF_tcGFdLweT_dkNRpYWyFuuEbs6TGb6NYBlZrWFpcKTdRuKLXgJHBp-8TkkL_uCXmi8ijDG9Dibouo0k5tUU9W_r6NkfAnNZ-mrG4acDPVHhnX959A8NNhGo799zGiM2OCNtfA4E-6aLT2mf9oOx50sNSUT6qZvvx8o3SjyRY9BQGrVb37RZzoKyAPuD7zAdcgBwMKj4QqEYA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

I've just returned from Arizona where I visited our southern border. What I saw there was beyond frustrating.

Democrats, led by the Biden administration, are leaving the border wall unfinished with materials already delivered just lying there. _They are leaving gaps in the border wall wide enough to drive a tank through.

_ The Biden Administration has no intention of finishing the job, despite the materials laying on the ground ready to be installed. _**It simply doesn't make sense.**_

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7c547d7fe604a43be3eb861bcf0d885&_e=V90gRLQIuMN5oRgY9xcIgEs9E53goMBbwE8RtKTkS9ZybCwTbVCW3i384DWHur29W-rlyx7gpFOUsY4BF-oGJl5rUGv8d4tLYz6muy3qfbUfvPY-yxjeF7hOPeV-Eu_OqJRlVqD2GpcU3KEn0xrLJNKqF1XebPvxuTPTjeOJirO65qvf6pBLpiVRSA8D28JudH3V0bWodLneJL4Dk-_mgewDbmVplpROnxJEvR510tsOB5xfDqYZJzWr0YNCogHdjg1319cAjGrZlONBQ2ggX_88zPlm39uvcWfKmxbVHWXHL-7NZ_eYsqTHc8gpDoLSUKEjadOBWfk4sdI18Mx9xfL4d7x2Y7kKcd5Do1QY38VTjAFCdYdNMr3NVjk0Bb6M4wrK2AmJIVrpSDRJ4F3bTQ%3D%3D)
The wall was built for a purpose - to keep people from entering the United States illegally, but it is ineffective if it has gaping holes in it. Peter, ending construction of the border wall is a clear sign the Democrats simply are not serious about border security.

I'm determined to find out why this project has been abandoned. You can be sure that I will ask the Department of Homeland Security whether they intend to finish the wall.

I firmly believe a secure border barrier is essential to finally ending illegal crossings.

**[But I want to hear from you, Peter. Please take my one question, Flash Poll:](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7c547d7fe604a43be3eb861bcf0d885&_e=V90gRLQIuMN5oRgY9xcIgEs9E53goMBbwE8RtKTkS9ZybCwTbVCW3i384DWHur29W-rlyx7gpFOUsY4BF-oGJl5rUGv8d4tLYz6muy3qfbUfvPY-yxjeF7hOPeV-Eu_OqJRlVqD2GpcU3KEn0xrLJNKqF1XebPvxuTPTjeOJirO65qvf6pBLpiVRSA8D28JujVCC3GDb89auZvMxrBd5Z-r8vw6IgpWq5bfUqv3JSd60dlnYCVK-hLyOO_EetE_W9XCwRG9Kpo3QvlsGNkwakadlwJ4Zs78ABxbPed3c74PF4tVAGK0pwkss3v3vESQZkl9rpPp561TlKx7uN04IAYm00CimSy_1DzDmXnA5H6VOH2da7b-rBUZ3hhmc2bthyQ8IOIsGAtmb2vsZNy6hjw%3D%3D)**

**[Should we finish the Border Wall?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7c547d7fe604a43be3eb861bcf0d885&_e=V90gRLQIuMN5oRgY9xcIgEs9E53goMBbwE8RtKTkS9ZybCwTbVCW3i384DWHur29W-rlyx7gpFOUsY4BF-oGJl5rUGv8d4tLYz6muy3qfbUfvPY-yxjeF7hOPeV-Eu_OqJRlVqD2GpcU3KEn0xrLJNKqF1XebPvxuTPTjeOJirO65qvf6pBLpiVRSA8D28Ju42zFxVdYThdDBB1ui75TJUjN-dm1RKBKQUmp9ZR0KZ2-330p13GYiuHxGYq-NtMStN5ShyPyrY-eT4byazJXdlTTw8uI-n6_k7juGSqErLsT0i9D05cRW98tkUbHjwi2zpgBqmpKAv-o4sTS7fsNFwAxzPNz5MlTuZ7tpCijfq8AlsNragMDM5W-KsIveD9eQmO1ILsMvLlc0h0TmA9zLg%3D%3D)**
| [**Vote Now ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7c547d7fe604a43be3eb861bcf0d885&_e=V90gRLQIuMN5oRgY9xcIgEs9E53goMBbwE8RtKTkS9ZybCwTbVCW3i384DWHur29W-rlyx7gpFOUsY4BF-oGJl5rUGv8d4tLYz6muy3qfbUfvPY-yxjeF7hOPeV-Eu_OqJRlVqD2GpcU3KEn0xrLJNKqF1XebPvxuTPTjeOJirO65qvf6pBLpiVRSA8D28JuBZ5XUOO3ZA3FpY6brKqLFUfC2Exq0fkuIvjsqZENo6yDRAdpBUXLj_wGGbKjKwvXaccFck1F0cndSkl92-kCqyUGAKlGUNyeAoQqtxuGyuRwYu7W9iz6KqLfb7w2LwNr2bWoLA4pcJ35z5f5eKQAOJj0hAvtS_1AyU_ijXx8Epq5qHJLCO5xQ51i6RSQkG_BZW8xsGf6J5sUxoIEZ92h4w%3D%3D)
---

Peter, I'm afraid the Democrats don't have any intention of finishing the wall simply because it was a key effort of President Donald Trump. The Radical Left doesn't want to do anything President Trump supported - _even if it makes sense._

This is childish and wrong, and we must do better. **[Please sound off on this crucial Flash Poll in the next 48 hours.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7c547d7fe604a43be3eb861bcf0d885&_e=V90gRLQIuMN5oRgY9xcIgEs9E53goMBbwE8RtKTkS9ZybCwTbVCW3i384DWHur29W-rlyx7gpFOUsY4BF-oGJl5rUGv8d4tLYz6muy3qfbUfvPY-yxjeF7hOPeV-Eu_OqJRlVqD2GpcU3KEn0xrLJNKqF1XebPvxuTPTjeOJirO65qvf6pBLpiVRSA8D28JuhAvHJ2K_89oHFTFWccqIfskkl_hsLFizL-RVowlEzsIF7blrSFDQjKPoo5jSU6ax_yxDSCrNp5tHraWbxNVnKPCW7uBwvlH0fzWNRcBPWVBMFq7qOYUffiBCiOZX48Cln8t9y8nMyf3Ghnemj8hVWE2CqmL3mUU22GntMBPl6NkBCuwOcUy-V0gTFK_5cCNEdQbbJY80K6LWKQZN6ArGOA%3D%3D)**

**I look forward to hearing from you, Peter.**

Sincerely,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7c547d7fe604a43be3eb861bcf0d885&_e=V90gRLQIuMN5oRgY9xcIgEs9E53goMBbwE8RtKTkS9ZybCwTbVCW3i384DWHur29W-rlyx7gpFOUsY4BF-oGJl5rUGv8d4tLYz6muy3qfbUfvPY-yxjeF7hOPeV-Eu_OqJRlVqD2GpcU3KEn0xrLJNKqF1XebPvxuTPTjeOJirO65qvf6pBLpiVRSA8D28Ju3zxmRJY2LFx509OP_d5lakm85W8ChHsBRuJpUHRD8-edrtLg_VqmMHbzPb_0Sh1VTeUFXL0O-hpr8MSI-f8nEOV3egn4sqEEut92128QHzoR9iwlUhawZmNtBLkvxZWeY4JEmwTf_xz7QKbx4z1-MQDZZfSjEagz2xqGHrxqYWBAVBtjtgfFtyJUSj_aCDLeV9y9w0J5aTsTmBAWVV3vhQ%3D%3D)

Lindsey Graham
